transcript.text: We're in Copenhagen, Denmark. As you can see, it's a big-time bicycling town. Lots of people on bicycles. Lots of bicycle shops everywhere. There was one just a couple meters down that way.
Lots of people go by. Who's winning? Nobody, I guess. Here's the central lake.
Canal in Copenhagen. That's what the buildings look like. Painted different colors. Typical of Europe.
We've got a cool little dove area here when they feed them. Those little guys are loving it.
So I'm going to go look for the hostel now. Oh, yeah. Pretty girls. I should have a pretty girl video.
There we are. There we are. Okay.
Copenhagen. We are here right now. We are near the lakes.
